svg.title: GHL Chatbot Architecture — Two Agents, Shared KB
svg.desc: Flowchart showing Aifyze AI Agent and Watts Group AI Agent sharing KB General, with Aifyze also having KB1–KB4.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Aifyze AI Agent configuration')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Watts Group AI Agent configuration')
sendPrompt('What content is in KB General?')
sendPrompt('What is in KB1 Assessment and Scoring?')
sendPrompt('What is in KB2 Services and Pricing?')
sendPrompt('What is in KB3 Objection Handling?')
sendPrompt('What is in KB4 Company and Contact?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through GHL setup Step 1 — creating KB General')
sendPrompt('Walk me through GHL setup Step 2 — creating KB1 to KB4')
sendPrompt('Walk me through GHL setup Step 3 — creating the Aifyze AI Agent')
sendPrompt('Walk me through GHL setup Step 4 — creating the Watts Group AI Agent')

g.text: KB General attaches to BOTH agents — KB1–KB4 attach to Aifyze only
